docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MALIK, ISHAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, JAKIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-26-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, JAKIE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT LIM, JAKIE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO JAN-31-2012 AT 1:30 PM DEPT.#506. - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-31-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LIM, JAKIE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MALIK, ISHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-31-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-31-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-31-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK; S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALIK, ISHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIM, JAKIE $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,575.00, THE DEFENDANT AND HER PROPERTY MANAGER REPEATEDLY ENTERED PLAINTIFF'S APARTMENT AND TOOK PHOTOS INSIDE PLAINTIFF'S APARTMENT WITHOUT NOTICE AND WITHOUT PLAINTIFF'S PERMISSION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-31-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT LIM, JAKIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MALIK, ISHAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALIK, ISHAN
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LIM, JAKIE MAILED TO RESPONDENT MALIK, ISHAN
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

DECLARATION RE NOTICE OF EX-PARTE APPLICATION FOR CONTINUANCE OF TRIAL DATE FILED BY APPELLANT LIM, JAKIE

ORDER - EX PARTE ORDER CONTINUING SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-05-2012 - CONTINUED TO AUG-23-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 PER EX PARTE ORDER DATED 3/20/12. (206)
ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT LIM, JAKIE
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT LIM, JAKIE
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT LIM, JAKIE
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS - FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MALIK, ISHAN

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LIM, JAKIE
